## Problem and scope

What this subsystem must do, and what it explicitly does not do. Tie it back to
the tenets in the README.

## Prior art

How Redis, Valkey, KeyDB, DragonflyDB, Memcached, Garnet, and the relevant
research handle this. Cite version-pinned claims from `docs/prior-art/claims.yaml`
using the `[id]` form. State what we borrow, adapt, or reject, and why.

## Proposed design and options

The leading proposal, plus a table of decisions with the alternative each
rejects and the trade-off.
